name: Tomato
description: Needs plenty of sun and warmth. Excellent grown in deep pots on a balcony.

pests.name: Aphids
pests.remedy: Spray with insecticidal soap or a strong water jet; encourage ladybugs.

pests.name: Tomato hornworm
pests.remedy: Hand-pick at dusk; grow borage or dill nearby.

pests.name: Late blight
pests.remedy: Avoid wetting foliage, space for airflow, remove infected leaves promptly.

name: Lettuce
description: Grows well even in partial shade and avoids the scorching summer sun that would make it bolt early.

pests.name: Aphids
pests.remedy: Rinse off with water; use insecticidal soap.

pests.name: Slugs & snails
pests.remedy: Beer traps, copper tape, hand-pick at night.

pests.name: Downy mildew
pests.remedy: Improve airflow, water at the base, avoid overcrowding.

name: Basil
description: Loves warmth and moderate sun. Next to tomatoes it improves their flavour and repels some pests.

pests.name: Fusarium wilt
pests.remedy: Use clean soil, avoid overwatering, remove affected plants.

name: Zucchini
description: A vigorous plant that needs very large pots (at least 40 cm) and abundant water.

pests.name: Squash bug
pests.remedy: Hand-pick eggs under leaves; row covers until flowering.

pests.name: Powdery mildew
pests.remedy: Improve airflow; milk or baking-soda spray; water at base.

name: Strawberry
description: A perennial that yields sweet fruit in spring. Suited to hanging pots or railing planters.

pests.name: Spider mites
pests.remedy: Spray leaf undersides with water; neem oil.

pests.name: Grey mould (Botrytis)
pests.remedy: Remove ripe or rotting fruit, improve airflow.

name: Mint
description: Very invasive. It is essential to grow it alone in a dedicated pot to keep it from smothering the other plants.

pests.name: Mint rust
pests.remedy: Remove infected leaves, avoid overhead watering.

name: Chili Pepper
description: Loves blazing sun. The more sun it gets, the hotter and more colourful the fruit.

pests.name: Blossom-end rot
pests.remedy: Keep watering even; ensure calcium availability.

name: Radish
description: Very fast growing (ready to harvest in 30 days). Perfect for a first growing experience.

name: Spinach
description: Prefers cool climates. Tolerates shade very well and is ideal for autumn and winter growing.

name: Parsley
description: Grows well in partial sun. A very hardy biennial plant.

pests.name: Carrot fly
pests.remedy: Fine mesh barrier; grow with onions or chives.

name: Carrot
description: Needs a deep pot for the roots to develop straight. Onions nearby help repel the carrot fly.

pests.name: Carrot fly
pests.remedy: Fleece or mesh barriers; sow with onions/chives.

name: Bell Pepper
description: A warmth-loving relative of the chili. Sweet, blocky fruit that ripens from green to red in full sun.

name: Eggplant
description: Loves heat and large pots. Pairs well with beans, which enrich the soil it heavily depletes.

name: Cucumber
description: A thirsty climber. Give it a trellis on the balcony railing to save space and keep the fruit clean.

pests.name: Powdery mildew
pests.remedy: Airflow; milk spray; water at base.

name: Bush Bean
description: A compact nitrogen-fixer that enriches the soil. Ideal as a beginner's first vegetable.

name: Pea
description: A cool-season climber that fixes nitrogen. Sow early in spring or autumn and give it support.

pests.name: Pea moth
pests.remedy: Cover during flowering; sow early or late.

name: Arugula
description: A fast, peppery salad green. Tolerates partial shade and bolts quickly in summer heat.

name: Kale
description: An extremely hardy leafy green whose flavour actually improves after the first frost.

name: Swiss Chard
description: A cut-and-come-again green with colourful stems. One sowing keeps producing for months.

name: Beetroot
description: Both the root and the leaves are edible. Grows happily in a medium-depth container.

name: Onion
description: A pest-repelling allium that protects nearby carrots, but dislikes growing next to legumes.

name: Garlic
description: Planted in autumn for a summer harvest. A natural fungicide that deters many balcony pests.

pests.name: White rot
pests.remedy: Long rotation; use clean seed cloves.

name: Chive
description: A perennial onion-flavoured herb with edible purple flowers. Thrives in a small pot for years.

name: Rosemary
description: An evergreen Mediterranean shrub that thrives in full sun and tolerates drought beautifully.

pests.name: Spittlebug
pests.remedy: Hose off the foam; generally low risk.

name: Thyme
description: A low-growing, drought-tolerant herb. Its flowers attract pollinators to the whole balcony.

name: Oregano
description: A hardy perennial that loves sun and poor, well-drained soil. Spreads to fill its pot.

name: Sage
description: An aromatic evergreen herb that deters cabbage moths. Prefers dry feet and plenty of light.

name: Coriander
description: Grown for both its leaves (cilantro) and seeds. Bolts fast in heat, so prefers cooler spells.

name: Dill
description: A feathery herb whose flowers attract beneficial insects. Keep it away from carrots, a close relative.

name: Marigold
description: A companion-planting hero: its roots deter nematodes and its scent confuses many vegetable pests.

name: Nasturtium
description: An edible-flowered trap crop that lures aphids away from your vegetables. Trails beautifully from pots.

pests.name: Aphids
pests.remedy: Acts as a trap crop; hose off or remove infested parts.

name: Chamomile
description: A delicate herb for teas that improves the vigour of nearby brassicas and attracts pollinators.

name: Lavender
description: A drought-loving perennial that draws bees and butterflies. Needs full sun and sharp drainage.

name: Cabbage
description: A heavy feeder that forms tight heads in cool weather. Aromatic herbs nearby ward off the cabbage moth.

name: Broccoli
description: A cool-season brassica. After the central head is cut, it keeps producing smaller side shoots.

name: Cauliflower
description: The fussiest brassica: it needs steady moisture and cool temperatures to form a firm white curd.

name: Leek
description: A hardy allium that stands through winter. Mound soil around the stems to blanch them white and tender.

name: Celery
description: A thirsty crop that demands constant moisture and rich soil. Rewards patience with crisp stalks.

name: Fennel
description: Best grown alone: it secretes compounds that stunt most neighbours. Forms a sweet anise-flavoured bulb.

name: Turnip
description: A fast-maturing root crop for cool seasons. Both the swollen root and the leafy tops are edible.

name: Sweet Potato
description: A heat-loving tuber with trailing vines. Needs a large, deep container and a long, warm growing season.

name: Potato
description: Grown easily in a deep grow-bag. Earth up the stems as they rise to boost the tuber harvest.

pests.name: Late blight
pests.remedy: Hill the soil; resistant varieties; remove infected foliage.

name: Pumpkin
description: A sprawling vine needing the largest pots and lots of water. Train it up a sturdy balcony trellis to save floor space.

name: Watermelon
description: Demands intense heat, full sun and a big pot. Choose a compact bush variety for balcony success.

name: Melon
description: A sun-worshipping vine. Support ripening fruit in a net sling when grown vertically on a balcony.

name: Okra
description: A tall, heat-loving plant with showy flowers. Harvest the tender pods young, every couple of days.

name: Sweet Corn
description: The classic 'Three Sisters' partner. Plant in a tight block of several pots so the ears pollinate well.

pests.name: Corn earworm
pests.remedy: Apply mineral oil to silks; Bt.

name: Sunflower
description: A cheerful pollinator magnet. Dwarf varieties suit pots, and the seed heads feed birds in autumn.

pests.name: Aphids
pests.remedy: Acts as a trap crop; hose off.

name: Borage
description: An edible-flowered herb that draws bees and is said to improve the flavour of strawberries and tomatoes.

pests.name: Aphids
pests.remedy: Trap crop; hose off or leave for ladybugs.

name: Sorrel
description: A hardy perennial green with a sharp, lemony tang. Tolerates shade and crops for years from one pot.
